layer3_inference: Grid operators are monitoring dispatch channels separately from SCADA log (hidden move)
rejection_reason: No data supports this inference. Layer 3 confidence was already 'low.' The inference is plausible as a real-world possibility but has zero evidentiary basis in available data. Per burden of proof Step 2, inferences with no supporting data are stripped from scoring. This inference was constructed from operator log tone and absence of documented communications — both of which are interpretive, not evidentiary.
